title: Welcome to the dummy API
body: This is a sample post stored in a local JSON file.

title: Learning Node Servers
body: Use the local /api/posts route to serve static JSON data dynamically.

title: Search by User ID
body: Type a user ID and press search to filter posts from this JSON dataset.

title: Simple Demo Data
body: Each post object includes userId, id, title, and body fields.

title: Local JSON API
body: This dummy API returns data from a local JSON file without external requests.

title: Dynamic Search Page
body: The page updates automatically when the search button is clicked.

title: Node + Fetch Demo
body: Use a Node server to deliver both HTML and API responses.

title: No JSONPlaceholder Needed
body: This app now uses dummy JSON data locally in the Search-web folder.

title: Offline-Friendly Example
body: Local data makes the demo easier to run without relying on an online API.

title: Ready for Testing
body: Search user IDs 1 through 5 to see filtered dummy posts.
